prediction_outcome: K>V universality REJECTED. V>K on Phi (10/12 layers, p<0.05). Disconfirmatory prediction correct in direction, exceeded in magnitude.
key_finding: V > K probing on Phi-3.5-mini (MHA, analog) at 10/12 layers (bootstrap p<0.05). Mean V|nums=+0.167 vs K|nums=+0.120 (diff=-0.048). REVERSES Qwen's K>V (32/36 layers, diff=+0.043). K>V probing is architecture-specific (GQA→K wins, MHA→V wins), NOT universal. Causal importance (perturbation K>V) ≠ information content (probing K vs V).
evidence_impact: MAJOR REVISION: K>V hierarchy split into two dissociated properties — universal perturbation fragility vs architecture-dependent information content. Hidden channel uses BOTH K and V; balance depends on GQA vs MHA.
next_planned: Llama K vs V sweep (GQA architecture — test if K>V is GQA-general or Qwen-specific)

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: REVISED: K>V perturbation fragility universal (5 models). K>V probing ARCHITECTURE-DEPENDENT: GQA (Qwen)→K wins, MHA (Phi)→V wins. RoPE not an artifact (Exp 092).

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: STRONG: Position-sweep on 2 families + 2 sizes. Layer sweep for both K+V on Qwen and Phi. K>V probing = architecture-dependent (exp 093). Paraphrase NULL. WRRA on 2 families.

cross_model_replication.status: STRONG: Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2 position-sweep (2 families + 2 sizes). K vs V layer sweep on Qwen AND Phi (exp 093). Mistral weak.
